mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, RATING as rating, LIKES_COUNT as likesCount, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture FROM STORE WHERE STATUS = '승인' ORDER BY LIKES_COUNT DESC, RATING DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
